name: Kentucky Pecan Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first seven ingredients in order listed; beat at medium speed of a mixer until smooth.
2. Stir in chopped pecans.
3. Beat egg whites (at room temperature) until stiff; fold into batter.
4. Pour mixture into an ungreased 10-inch tube pan.
5. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour and 30 minutes.
6. Invert the pan, and cool cake completely; remove from pan.
7. Sprinkle top of cake with powdered sugar.
